creator: horia@racoviceanu.com
text:
From my tests, the font files from box.com and github.com/mozilla/Fira
have different file sizes and the fonts have different line spacing.

I have raised an Issue on Github about synchronizing these files:
https://github.com/mozilla/Fira/issues/24

I haven't noticed a difference in how "f" renders.

I've verified again MASTER_SITES in the Mozilla #UX channel on
irc://irc.mozilla.org/ux - http://pastebin.mozilla.org/4121788

Please close as line spacing may be adjusted in application.

Thank you.
